title: aloe lateritia var. kitaliensis
intro: Aloe lateritia var. kitaliensis is a lesser-known succulent plant that belongs to the Aloe genus, native to East Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Aloe lateritia var. kitaliensis include promoting skin hydration, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into gels, creams, or ointments for topical application, as well as teas and infusions for internal use.
intro_study: According to "Biomedicine & pharmacotherapy = Biomedecine & pharmacotherapie", aloe lateritia var. kitaliensis benefits include gastrointestinal activities and hepato-protective properties.
